response: Yes, both Villa Paletti and Betrayal at House on the Hill are board games. Villa Paletti is a physical skill-based board game designed by Bill Payne and published in 2001 by Zoch Verlag, while Betrayal at House on the Hill is a board game published by Avalon Hill in 2004, designed by Bruce Glassco and developed by several other designers. Both games involve strategic play on a board, with Villa Paletti focusing on constructing a villa by stacking columns and Betrayal at House on the Hill involving exploration and strategic decision-making in a haunted house setting.
